title: lachemilla mutisii
intro: Lachemilla mutisii, also known as sticky mouse-ear, is a flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lachemilla mutisii include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections.
